en-US.name: Prism
en-US.summary: Talk to your Prism family dashboard.
en-US.description: Ask Prism for today's events, upcoming events, today's tasks, your family list, mark chores complete, add shopping items, and post family messages.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Prism what's on today
Alexa, ask Prism what's coming up
Alexa, ask Prism for today's tasks

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Personal-use skill. Configure ALEXA_VOICE_TOKEN on the Prism server before invoking.
